summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard, not a dedupe cluster. Open PRs are kept as independent maintainer-review items; the linked security-sensitive issue is routed to central security handling; the closed linked issue remains historical context only.

actions.reason: Linked security-sensitive issue is out of scope for Clownfish backlog cleanup and must be routed without affecting unrelated PR classification.
Already closed linked issue is context for local-model work, not an actionable open candidate in this plan.
This is a focused config/cache PR with useful contributor work and maintainer-review risk, not a duplicate, superseded, or low-signal PR.
The PR appears useful but needs maintainer technical judgment and possible retargeting; no close or merge action is safe in this inventory plan.
Draft maintainer-owned feature/config work should stay open as an independent review item, not be closed as duplicate, low-signal, or superseded.
Draft Telegram delivery PR has contributor work and unresolved proof/compatibility review; it is not safe to close as low-signal or superseded in this shard.
Useful contributor PR should stay independently queued for maintainer review; linked security context does not justify closing or routing the PR itself.
